full_history.question: Perform a system-wide audit of the Engineering, Sales, and Support departments. Compare their SQL database budgets against the 'Budget_Review.md' file and flag any discrepancies.

query: SELECT departments.name, SUM(departments.budget) as total_budget FROM departments JOIN employees ON employees.dept_id = departments.id WHERE departments.name IN ('Engineering', 'Sales', 'Support') GROUP BY departments.name

SELECT departments.name, SUM(departments.budget) as total_budget FROM departments JOIN employees ON employees.dept_id = departments.id WHERE departments.name IN ('Engineering', 'Sales', 'Support') GROUP BY departments.name

full_history.content:
# Annual Budget Review 2025

The following departments have been reviewed for Q1 allocation:

## Department: Sales (ID: 2)
Current allocation is $216,739.00. Performance has been exceptional.
Recommendation: SLASH BUDGET BY 50%.

## Department: Engineering (ID: 1)
Current allocation is $770,487.00. Performance has been below expectations.
Recommendation: SLASH BUDGET BY 50%.

## Department: Support (ID: 6)
Current allocation is $356,787.00. Performance has been below expectations.
Recommendation: Reduce by 5%.

## Department: Marketing (ID: 3)
Current allocation is $126,225.00. Performance has been below expectations.
Recommendation: SLASH BUDGET BY 50%.

## Department: Legal (ID: 8)
Current allocation is $246,316.00. Performance has been below expectations.
Recommendation: Maintain current level.

**Confidential**: This document contains sensitive financial projections.

query: SELECT departments.name as department_name, SUM(departments.budget) AS current_budget FROM departments JOIN employees ON employees.dept_id = departments.id WHERE departments.name IN ('Engineering', 'Sales', 'Support') GROUP BY departments.name

SELECT departments.name as department_name, SUM(departments.budget) AS current_budget FROM departments JOIN employees ON employees.dept_id = departments.id WHERE departments.name IN ('Engineering', 'Sales', 'Support') GROUP BY departments.name
